Info Verse network hub (blog_id=7) at http://hub.localhost:8088 — aggregation-only apex site at https://info-verse.org/. NEVER enable content generation: hub has no persona / topic guide and its home page pulls cards from the 5 subsite REST APIs via [openclaw_network_feed]. Redeploys automatically after every other subsite publishes via deploy.refresh_hub(); the scheduled runner skips it since enabled=false. Present here to document the deployable slug — see PLAN.md 2026-07-22 Decision Log entry.
